tasks.subject: 1C Task 0: Screenshots helper (path + dir + delay)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure browser-free util: errors-dir resolution (+create), screenshot path, portable relative path, capture delay.

**Files:** src/Utils/Screenshots.php, tests/Unit/Utils/ScreenshotsTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Utils/ScreenshotsTest.php → 7 green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Utils/Screenshots.php", "tests/Unit/Utils/ScreenshotsTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Utils/ScreenshotsTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["errorsDir create flag works", "relativeErrorPath stable", "captureDelay env+default+nonneg"]}
```

tasks.subject: 1C Task 1: Wire helper into capture, link, diagnostics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reliable capture (dir created, configurable delay, recorded failures), fixed Output link, surfaced capture failures.

**Files:** src/Expects/Expect.php, src/Utils/Output.php, src/Tests/TestsSuite.php

**Verify:** php -l on the 3 files && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Expects/Expect.php", "src/Utils/Output.php", "src/Tests/TestsSuite.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l src/Expects/Expect.php && php -l src/Utils/Output.php && php -l src/Tests/TestsSuite.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["capture uses helper+create", "delay configurable", "failure recorded", "Output link fixed", "attachScreen diagnostic", "test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: 1C Task 2: Reference screenshot in JUnit report
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Failed testcase with screenshot carries reference in <failure> message (GitHub Actions) and <system-out> [[ATTACHMENT|…]] (GitLab/Jenkins).

**Files:** src/Reports/JUnitReport.php, tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php → 7 green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Reports/JUnitReport.php", "tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Reports/JUnitReportTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fail+screen emits message line + system-out attachment", "fail without screen emits neither", "XML well-formed"]}
```
